name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent sales cause missed tax deadlines. We automate payroll tax compliance instead of manual calculations and filing with no reminders.
problem_solved: Difficulty in managing payroll tax compliance due to varying sales volumes.
features: Notify payroll administrator of due dates
